questions.scenario: Both `orders-web-01` and `orders-web-02` use the same API port. Where should `orders_api_port: 8080` normally live?

options.text: `group_vars/orders_web.yml`, because the value describes the whole group.
Inside every task that needs the port.
Only in a handler, because handlers run late.
In the inventory group name itself.

questions.explanation: A group variable keeps shared values close to the scope they describe and avoids repeated literals across tasks.
